schemes.name: PM-KISAN
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers owning cultivable land up to 2 hectares. Excludes institutional landholders, retired government employees earning above Rs 10,000/month, income taxpayers, and constitutional post holders.
schemes.benefit: Rs 6,000 per year in 3 equal installments of Rs 2,000 each, directly into the farmer's bank account (DBT).
documents: Land ownership proof (7/12 extract or Khasra-Khatauni)
steps_en: Visit pmkisan.gov.in on your phone or computer
Click 'New Farmer Registration' on the home page
Select 'Rural Farmer Registration' or 'Urban Farmer Registration'
Enter your Aadhaar number and captcha, then click 'Get OTP'
Enter the OTP received on your mobile
Fill in your personal details: name, date of birth, gender, category
Enter your bank account number and IFSC code
Upload your land records (7/12 extract)
Submit the form — you will receive a registration number
Track status on the portal using your Aadhaar number
steps_mr: तुमच्या फोन किंवा संगणकावर pmkisan.gov.in उघडा
मुख्यपृष्ठावर 'New Farmer Registration' वर क्लिक करा
तुमचा आधार नंबर आणि कॅप्चा टाका, 'Get OTP' वर क्लिक करा
नाव, जन्मतारीख, लिंग, जात हे तपशील भरा
बँक खाते नंबर आणि IFSC कोड टाका
फॉर्म सबमिट करा — नोंदणी क्रमांक मिळेल
steps_hi: pmkisan.gov.in खोलें
'New Farmer Registration' पर क्लिक करें
'Rural Farmer Registration' चुनें
आधार नंबर और कैप्चा भरें, 'Get OTP' पर क्लिक करें
मोबाइल पर आया OTP दर्ज करें
नाम, जन्म तिथि, लिंग, श्रेणी भरें
बैंक खाता नंबर और IFSC कोड दर्ज करें
भूमि रिकॉर्ड अपलोड करें
फॉर्म जमा करें — पंजीकरण नंबर मिलेगा
आधार नंबर से स्थिति जांचें

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
schemes.eligibility: Poor and vulnerable families listed in SECC 2011 database. Covers 10.74 crore families (about 50 crore beneficiaries). No upper limit on family size or age.
schemes.benefit: Health insurance coverage of Rs 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization. Covers pre and post hospitalization expenses.
steps_en: Visit pmjay.gov.in and check if your family is eligible
Click 'Am I Eligible' and enter your mobile number
Enter OTP and search by name, HHD number, or Ration card
If eligible, visit your nearest Common Service Centre (CSC) or empanelled hospital
Submit Aadhaar and Ration card at the CSC
Get your Ayushman Bharat Golden Card (e-card)
Use this card at any empanelled government or private hospital
Treatment up to Rs 5 lakh is completely free
steps_mr: pmjay.gov.in वर जाऊन 'Am I Eligible' तपासा
मोबाइल नंबर टाका आणि OTP द्या
नजीकच्या CSC केंद्रावर किंवा रुग्णालयात जा
कोणत्याही सूचीबद्ध रुग्णालयात हे कार्ड वापरा
steps_hi: pmjay.gov.in पर जाकर 'Am I Eligible' जांचें
मोबाइल नंबर डालें और OTP दर्ज करें
नाम या राशन कार्ड से खोजें
नजदीकी CSC केंद्र या अस्पताल जाएं
आधार और राशन कार्ड जमा करें
आयुष्मान भारत गोल्डन कार्ड प्राप्त करें
किसी भी सूचीबद्ध अस्पताल में कार्ड दिखाएं
5 लाख तक का इलाज बिल्कुल मुफ्त

schemes.name: PMAY – Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana
schemes.eligibility: Economically Weaker Section (EWS) with annual income up to Rs 3 lakh, Low Income Group (LIG) up to Rs 6 lakh, Middle Income Group (MIG-I) up to Rs 12 lakh, MIG-II up to Rs 18 lakh. Applicant must not own a pucca house anywhere in India.
schemes.benefit: Subsidy on home loan interest — up to Rs 2.67 lakh for EWS/LIG, Rs 2.35 lakh for MIG-I, Rs 2.30 lakh for MIG-II. Central assistance of Rs 1.5 lakh for rural areas.
documents: Property documents or land ownership proof
steps_en: Visit pmaymis.gov.in
Click 'Citizen Assessment' and select your category (Slum / Other 3 Components)
Enter your 12-digit Aadhaar number and verify
Fill in personal details: name, income, bank account, address
Fill in details about the house you want to buy/build
Submit the form and note the Application ID
Visit your bank or Housing Finance Company with your Application ID
Bank will process the home loan with applicable subsidy
Track status at pmaymis.gov.in using your Application ID
steps_mr: आधार नंबर टाका आणि OTP द्या
नाव, उत्पन्न, बँक खाते, पत्ता भरा
फॉर्म सबमिट करा आणि Application ID लिहा
बँकेत किंवा गृह वित्त कंपनीत जा
steps_hi: pmaymis.gov.in पर जाएं
'Citizen Assessment' पर क्लिक करें
आधार नंबर डालें और OTP दर्ज करें
नाम, आय, बैंक खाता, पता भरें
घर से जुड़ी जानकारी भरें
फॉर्म जमा करें और Application ID नोट करें
बैंक या हाउसिंग फाइनेंस कंपनी जाएं
बैंक लोन पर सब्सिडी देगा
Application ID से स्थिति जांचें

schemes.name: PAN Card Application
schemes.eligibility: Any Indian citizen above 18 years. Minors can apply through parents. Mandatory for income tax filing, bank accounts, and financial transactions above Rs 50,000.
schemes.benefit: Permanent Account Number — a 10-digit alphanumeric unique ID used for all tax and financial transactions in India. Enables income tax filing and prevents tax evasion.
documents: Proof of identity: Voter ID / Passport / Driving License
Proof of address: Utility bill / Bank statement
Proof of date of birth: Birth certificate / Matriculation certificate
steps_en: For Instant PAN (free): Visit incometax.gov.in → 'Instant e-PAN'
Enter your Aadhaar number and complete OTP verification
Instant PAN allocated within minutes via email
For physical PAN: Visit onlineservices.tin.egov-nsdl.com
Click 'Apply for New PAN' → Form 49A (Indian citizens)
Fill personal details, upload photo and documents
Pay Rs 107 (India delivery) or Rs 1017 (foreign delivery)
Note the 15-digit acknowledgment number
PAN card delivered to address within 15-20 working days
steps_mr: तात्काळ PAN साठी: incometax.gov.in वर जा → 'Instant e-PAN' निवडा
आधार नंबर टाका आणि OTP द्या
फिजिकल PAN साठी: onlineservices.tin.egov-nsdl.com वर जा
Form 49A भरा आणि कागदपत्रे अपलोड करा
15-20 कामकाजाच्या दिवसांत PAN कार्ड पत्त्यावर येईल
steps_hi: इंस्टेंट PAN के लिए: incometax.gov.in → 'Instant e-PAN' खोलें
आधार नंबर डालें और OTP दर्ज करें
कुछ मिनटों में PAN ईमेल पर मिलेगा
फिजिकल PAN: onlineservices.tin.egov-nsdl.com पर जाएं
Form 49A भरें और दस्तावेज अपलोड करें
₹107 शुल्क भुगतान करें
acknowledgment नंबर नोट करें
15-20 कार्यदिवसों में PAN कार्ड मिलेगा

schemes.name: Aadhaar Update / Correction
schemes.eligibility: Any Aadhaar holder can update their address online for free. Name, date of birth, and gender updates require document proof and may have a nominal fee at Aadhaar Seva Kendra.
schemes.benefit: Keep your Aadhaar details current — essential for availing government subsidies, banking services, and digital identity. Address update is free online.
documents: Current Aadhaar number and registered mobile number (for OTP)
For address update: Utility bill / Bank passbook / Rental agreement / Driving License
For name change: Gazette notification / Marriage certificate
For DOB change: Birth certificate / School leaving certificate
For biometric update: Visit Aadhaar Seva Kendra in person
steps_en: Visit myaadhaar.uidai.gov.in
Click 'Update Aadhaar' and log in with mobile OTP
Select what you want to update: Address / Name / DOB
For address update: Upload proof document (bill or bank passbook)
Verify details and submit
Note the Update Request Number (URN)
Track update status at uidai.gov.in using URN
Updated Aadhaar available for download in 3-5 working days
steps_mr: 'Update Aadhaar' वर क्लिक करा आणि OTP ने लॉगिन करा
काय अपडेट करायचे ते निवडा: पत्ता / नाव / जन्मतारीख
पत्ता अपडेटसाठी: वीजबिल किंवा बँक पासबुक अपलोड करा
3-5 दिवसांत अपडेटेड आधार डाउनलोड करता येईल
steps_hi: myaadhaar.uidai.gov.in खोलें
'Update Aadhaar' पर क्लिक करें और OTP से लॉगिन करें
क्या अपडेट करना है चुनें: पता / नाम / जन्म तिथि
पते के लिए: बिजली बिल या बैंक पासबुक अपलोड करें
विवरण जांचें और सबमिट करें
URN नंबर नोट करें
3-5 दिनों में अपडेटेड आधार डाउनलोड करें

schemes.name: Ration Card Application
schemes.eligibility: All Indian families are eligible. Categories: APL (Above Poverty Line), BPL (Below Poverty Line), Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY) for poorest families, and PHH (Priority Households). Family income and land holding determine category.
schemes.benefit: Subsidized food grains: BPL/AAY families get rice at Rs 3/kg, wheat at Rs 2/kg, and coarse grains at Re 1/kg under NFSA. Also provides identity proof and access to other welfare schemes.
documents: Proof of residence (electricity bill / bank passbook)
steps_en: Visit your state's Food & Civil Supplies Department website
For Maharashtra: visit mahafood.gov.in
Click 'Online Application for Ration Card'
Register with your mobile number and Aadhaar
Fill in family details — add all family members
Upload all required documents
Pay the application fee (nominal, state-dependent)
Submit and note the application number
Ration card officer may visit for verification
Collect ration card from your nearest Fair Price Shop or receive digitally
steps_mr: 'रेशन कार्डसाठी ऑनलाइन अर्ज' वर क्लिक करा
मोबाइल नंबर आणि आधारने नोंदणी करा
जवळच्या स्वस्त धान्य दुकानातून रेशन कार्ड घ्या
steps_hi: mahafood.gov.in या अपने राज्य की वेबसाइट पर जाएं
'राशन कार्ड के लिए ऑनलाइन आवेदन' पर क्लिक करें
मोबाइल नंबर और आधार से पंजीकरण करें
सभी परिवार के सदस्यों का विवरण भरें
सभी दस्तावेज अपलोड करें
आवेदन शुल्क भुगतान करें
आवेदन नंबर नोट करें
राशन कार्ड अधिकारी सत्यापन करेगा
नजदीकी उचित मूल्य दुकान से राशन कार्ड प्राप्त करें

schemes.name: MahaDBT Scholarship
schemes.eligibility: Students from Maharashtra belonging to SC/ST/OBC/VJNT/SBC/EWS categories enrolled in recognized educational institutions. Income criteria varies by scholarship scheme (typically family income below Rs 2.5 lakh to 8 lakh per year).
schemes.benefit: Various scholarships including: Post-Matric Scholarship, Maintenance Allowance, Examination Fee, Tuition Fee waiver, Hostel facility allowance. Amount varies from Rs 2,500 to Rs 1 lakh+ per year depending on course and category.
documents: Previous year marksheet / bonafide student certificate
Bank account details (student's own account, linked to Aadhaar)
steps_en: Visit mahadbt.maharashtra.gov.in
Click 'Student Login' and register with your Aadhaar and mobile
Complete your profile: personal, academic, bank details, family income
Upload all required documents clearly
Select the scholarship scheme you are eligible for
Apply for the scheme before the deadline
Your institution must verify and forward the application
Check application status on the portal
Scholarship amount credited directly to your bank account
steps_mr: 'Student Login' वर क्लिक करा आणि नोंदणी करा
प्रोफाइल पूर्ण करा: वैयक्तिक, शैक्षणिक, बँक, उत्पन्न
शिष्यवृत्ती थेट तुमच्या बँक खात्यात जमा होईल
steps_hi: mahadbt.maharashtra.gov.in पर जाएं
'Student Login' पर क्लिक करें और पंजीकरण करें
प्रोफाइल पूरा करें: व्यक्तिगत, शैक्षणिक, बैंक, पारिवारिक आय
सभी दस्तावेज स्पष्ट रूप से अपलोड करें
पात्र छात्रवृत्ति योजना चुनें
समयसीमा से पहले आवेदन करें
संस्थान सत्यापन करेगा
पोर्टल पर स्थिति जांचें
छात्रवृत्ति सीधे बैंक खाते में जमा होगी

schemes.name: Driving License Application
schemes.eligibility: Learner's License: Age 16+ for motorcycles without gear (< 50cc), Age 18+ for all other vehicles. Must be medically fit. For commercial vehicles: Age 20+ with valid LMV license for at least 1 year.
schemes.benefit: Official government document permitting you to drive motor vehicles on public roads. Also serves as identity proof and address proof.
documents: Age proof: Birth certificate / School leaving certificate
Existing Learner's License (for Driving License test)
steps_en: Visit sarathi.parivahan.gov.in
Select your state from the dropdown
Click 'Apply for Learner's License (LL)'
Fill in personal details and upload documents
Book a slot for the Learner's License test
Appear for the LL test at the RTO (fee: Rs 150-200)
Pass the test and download your Learner's License
Practice driving for at least 30 days
Apply for Driving License test on the same portal
Pass the driving test at RTO and receive your DL
steps_mr: 'Apply for Learner's License' वर क्लिक करा
तपशील भरा आणि कागदपत्रे अपलोड करा
RTO मध्ये LL चाचणीसाठी वेळ बुक करा
LL चाचणी पास करा आणि Learner's License डाउनलोड करा
किमान ३० दिवस वाहन चालवण्याचा सराव करा
RTO मध्ये DL चाचणी पास करा
steps_hi: sarathi.parivahan.gov.in पर जाएं
अपना राज्य चुनें
'Apply for Learner's License' पर क्लिक करें
विवरण भरें और दस्तावेज अपलोड करें
RTO में LL टेस्ट के लिए स्लॉट बुक करें
LL टेस्ट पास करके Learner's License डाउनलोड करें
कम से कम 30 दिन ड्राइविंग अभ्यास करें
Driving License टेस्ट के लिए आवेदन करें
RTO में DL टेस्ट पास करें

schemes.name: Birth Certificate Registration
schemes.eligibility: Mandatory for all births in India. Must be registered within 21 days of birth (free). Late registration (21 days to 1 year) requires Judicial Magistrate order. Beyond 1 year requires SDM/Sub-Registrar approval.
schemes.benefit: Official proof of date of birth, parentage, and place — required for school admission, passport, Aadhaar, voter ID, and most government services.
documents: Address proof of residence at time of birth
steps_en: For hospital births: Hospital automatically reports to Municipal Corporation / Gram Panchayat
Visit your local Municipal Corporation / Gram Panchayat office
Submit the birth report form along with hospital documents
Online option: Visit crsorgi.gov.in or state civil registration portal
Register with mobile OTP and fill birth details
Upload hospital records and parents' documents
Submit and receive acknowledgment
Certificate issued within 7-15 days
Collect from office or download digitally
steps_mr: रुग्णालयात जन्म झाल्यास: रुग्णालय महानगरपालिकेला आपोआप कळवते
जन्म अहवाल फॉर्म आणि रुग्णालयाचे कागदपत्रे द्या
जन्माचे तपशील भरा आणि कागदपत्रे अपलोड करा
steps_hi: अस्पताल में जन्म: अस्पताल नगर निगम को स्वतः सूचित करता है
नजदीकी नगर निगम / ग्राम पंचायत कार्यालय जाएं
जन्म रिपोर्ट फॉर्म और अस्पताल दस्तावेज जमा करें
ऑनलाइन: crsorgi.gov.in पर जाएं
जन्म विवरण भरें और दस्तावेज अपलोड करें
सबमिट करें और acknowledgment प्राप्त करें
7-15 दिनों में जन्म प्रमाण पत्र मिलेगा

schemes.name: Unemployment Allowance (Maharashtra)
schemes.eligibility: Maharashtra resident aged 18-35 years who is unemployed. Must be registered with Employment Exchange for at least 3 years. Annual family income below Rs 1.5 lakh. Must have passed at least 7th standard.
schemes.benefit: Monthly unemployment allowance of Rs 1,000 per month (12th pass), Rs 1,200 (graduate), Rs 1,500 (post-graduate). Maximum 2 years duration.
documents: Employment Exchange registration certificate (3+ years old)
Income certificate (family income below Rs 1.5 lakh)
steps_en: First register at your nearest Employment Exchange (District Employment Office)
Maintain Employment Exchange registration for at least 3 years
Visit rojgar.mahaswayam.gov.in
Log in with Employment Exchange number
Click 'Apply for Unemployment Allowance'
Fill in personal, educational, and family income details
Upload all required documents
Submit and note the application number
Verify from District Employment Officer
Allowance credited monthly to your bank account if approved
steps_mr: प्रथम नजीकच्या जिल्हा रोजगार कार्यालयात नोंदणी करा
'बेरोजगारी भत्त्यासाठी अर्ज करा' वर क्लिक करा
वैयक्तिक, शैक्षणिक आणि उत्पन्न तपशील भरा
मंजूर झाल्यास दरमहा बँक खात्यात पैसे जमा होतील
steps_hi: पहले नजदीकी जिला रोजगार कार्यालय में पंजीकरण करें
कम से कम 3 साल पंजीकरण बनाए रखें
rojgar.mahaswayam.gov.in पर जाएं
Employment Exchange नंबर से लॉगिन करें
'बेरोजगारी भत्ते के लिए आवेदन करें' पर क्लिक करें
व्यक्तिगत, शैक्षणिक और पारिवारिक आय विवरण भरें
सभी दस्तावेज अपलोड करें
आवेदन नंबर नोट करें
जिला रोजगार अधिकारी सत्यापन करेगा
मंजूरी पर मासिक भत्ता बैंक खाते में जमा होगा

schemes.name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
schemes.eligibility: Students from Class 1 to PhD level. Different schemes for SC/ST/OBC/Minority/EWS students. Family income generally below Rs 2.5 lakh/year.
schemes.benefit: Pre-matric and post-matric scholarships ranging from Rs 1,000 to Rs 20,000 per year for school and college students.
steps_en: Visit scholarships.gov.in
Register as new student with Aadhaar and mobile
Select appropriate scholarship scheme
Fill academic and family details
Upload documents and submit
Institute verifies and forwards application
Amount credited to bank account

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.eligibility: Parents/guardians of girl child below 10 years of age. One account per girl, maximum 2 girls per family (3 if twins). Account opened in bank or post office.
schemes.benefit: High interest savings scheme for girl child education and marriage. Current interest rate: 8.2% p.a. Tax-free returns. Maturity after 21 years.
steps_en: Visit nearest post office or bank (SBI, BOI, etc.)
Request Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana account opening form
Fill form with girl child and parent details
Submit birth certificate and ID proof
Deposit minimum Rs 250 to open account
Receive passbook — deposit any amount yearly (min Rs 250, max Rs 1.5 lakh)

schemes.name: PM Mudra Yojana
schemes.eligibility: Any Indian citizen starting or expanding a small/micro business. No collateral required. Three categories: Shishu (up to Rs 50,000), Kishor (Rs 50,001–5 lakh), Tarun (Rs 5 lakh–10 lakh).
schemes.benefit: Collateral-free business loan up to Rs 10 lakh for small businesses, startups, artisans, traders, and entrepreneurs.
steps_en: Visit any bank, NBFC, or MFI offering MUDRA loans
Ask for PM Mudra Yojana loan application
Choose category: Shishu / Kishor / Tarun
Fill application with business details
Submit documents including business plan
Bank appraises and sanctions loan
Amount credited to business account

schemes.name: Jal Jeevan Mission
schemes.eligibility: All rural households in India that do not have a functional household tap connection (FHTC). Priority to SC/ST households, backward villages, and drought-prone areas.
schemes.benefit: Free piped water supply connection to every rural household — minimum 55 litres per person per day. No cost to beneficiary for connection.
steps_en: Contact your local Gram Panchayat
Submit request for tap water connection
Gram Panchayat surveys household and registers
VWSC (Village Water & Sanitation Committee) prepares village plan
Connection provided free of charge
Track status on jaljeevanmission.gov.in

schemes.name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
schemes.eligibility: Women from BPL households aged 18+ who do not have an LPG connection. Priority to SC/ST, PMAY, AAY, forest dwellers, most backward classes, tea garden workers.
schemes.benefit: Free LPG gas connection (cylinder + stove) to BPL women. First refill free. Up to 12 subsidized cylinders per year.
documents: Self-declaration of no existing LPG connection
steps_en: Visit nearest LPG distributor (HP/Bharat/Indane)
Ask for Ujjwala Yojana application form
Fill KYC form with Aadhaar and bank details
Submit ration card and BPL proof
Connection approved and free cylinder delivered
Book refills online or via distributor

schemes.name: Voter ID Card (EPIC)
schemes.eligibility: Indian citizen aged 18 years or above. Must be ordinarily resident of the constituency where applying. NRIs can also apply for overseas voter registration.
schemes.benefit: Official photo identity card for voting in elections. Also widely accepted as address and identity proof for banking, travel, and government services.
documents: Proof of address (electricity bill / bank passbook)
steps_en: Visit voters.eci.gov.in
Click 'New Registration (Form 6)'
Fill personal details and constituency
Upload age proof, address proof, and photograph
Submit form online
BLO (Booth Level Officer) verifies at your address
Voter ID card sent to your address or download e-EPIC from portal

schemes.name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana
schemes.eligibility: Any Indian citizen above 10 years of age without a bank account. Zero balance account — no minimum balance required.
schemes.benefit: Zero balance savings account with RuPay debit card, Rs 2 lakh accident insurance, Rs 30,000 life insurance, Rs 10,000 overdraft facility after 6 months.
documents: OR Voter ID / Driving License / NREGA card
steps_en: Visit any nearby bank branch
Ask for PM Jan Dhan Yojana account opening
Fill account opening form
Submit Aadhaar card and photograph
Account opened same day with zero balance
Receive RuPay debit card within 7-10 days

schemes.name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
schemes.eligibility: All farmers (owner and tenant) growing notified crops in notified areas. Loanee farmers are automatically enrolled. Non-loanee farmers can opt-in voluntarily.
schemes.benefit: Crop insurance against natural calamities, pests, diseases. Premium: 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for horticulture. Government pays remaining premium.
steps_en: Visit pmfby.gov.in or nearest bank/CSC
Register with Aadhaar and land details
Select crop and coverage period
Pay farmer's share of premium (2% for Kharif)
Receive policy number
In case of crop loss, report within 72 hours via app or helpline 14447
Claim assessed and credited directly to bank account

schemes.name: IGNOAPS – Senior Citizen Pension
schemes.eligibility: Indian citizens aged 60 years and above from BPL households. Priority to those aged 80+ years. No other pension or regular income source.
schemes.benefit: Monthly pension: Rs 200 for age 60-79, Rs 500 for age 80+. State governments add additional contribution (total varies by state: Rs 400–Rs 2,000).
steps_en: Visit your local Gram Panchayat or Municipal Corporation
Ask for IGNOAPS/Old Age Pension application
Fill form with age proof and BPL certificate
Submit at Gram Panchayat/Ward Office
District Social Welfare Officer approves
Monthly pension credited to bank account

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
schemes.eligibility: All girl children from birth. Focuses on districts with low Child Sex Ratio. Benefits linked to SSY account and school education continuation.
schemes.benefit: Financial incentives for keeping girl children in school, awareness campaigns, conditional cash transfers in some states, Sukanya Samriddhi account integration.
steps_en: Open Sukanya Samriddhi account for girl at bank/post office
Ensure girl child is enrolled in school
Contact local ICDS Anganwadi centre for awareness programs
Avail state-specific incentives through district women and child office

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
schemes.eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-40 years. Must have a savings bank account. Cannot be an income tax payer. Primarily for unorganized sector workers.
schemes.benefit: Guaranteed monthly pension of Rs 1,000 to Rs 5,000 after age 60, depending on contribution amount. Government co-contributes 50% of contribution (up to Rs 1,000/year) for first 5 years.
steps_en: Visit your bank branch or apply via net banking/mobile banking
Ask for Atal Pension Yojana enrollment
Fill APY subscriber registration form
Choose pension amount (1000/2000/3000/4000/5000)
Auto-debit set up from savings account monthly
Track on NPS app or bank statement

schemes.name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
schemes.eligibility: Bank account holders aged 18-70 years. Must have Aadhaar linked to bank account. Premium auto-debited annually.
schemes.benefit: Accident insurance: Rs 2 lakh for accidental death or permanent total disability. Rs 1 lakh for partial disability. Annual premium only Rs 20.
steps_en: Visit your bank or net banking
Search for PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
Enable auto-debit consent for Rs 20/year
Enrollment confirmed via SMS
In case of accident, file claim at bank within 30 days
Submit FIR, medical/death certificate to bank

schemes.name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
schemes.eligibility: Bank account holders aged 18-50 years. Must have Aadhaar linked to savings bank account.
schemes.benefit: Life insurance cover of Rs 2 lakh on death due to any reason. Annual premium only Rs 436 (Rs 436/year auto-debited from account).
steps_en: Visit your bank or net banking portal
Enroll in PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
Give auto-debit consent for Rs 436/year
Enrollment confirmed via SMS
On policyholder death, nominee files claim at bank
Rs 2 lakh paid to nominee within 30 days

schemes.name: e-Shram Card (Unorganised Workers)
schemes.eligibility: Unorganised sector workers aged 16-59 years (construction workers, street vendors, domestic workers, farmers, fisherfolk, etc.). Should not be a member of EPFO/ESIC or income taxpayer.
schemes.benefit: Universal Account Number (UAN) for unorganised workers. Rs 2 lakh accident insurance free. Gateway for all future government welfare schemes.
steps_en: Visit eshram.gov.in or nearest CSC
Click 'Register on e-Shram'
Enter Aadhaar-linked mobile number and OTP
Fill occupation, address, bank details
Submit and download e-Shram card (UAN card)
Free Rs 2 lakh accident insurance activated immediately

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission – Free Toilet
schemes.eligibility: Rural BPL households without a toilet. Priority to SC/ST, small/marginal farmers, landless labourers, women-headed households, and disabled persons.
schemes.benefit: Rs 12,000 incentive for construction of individual household toilet. Amount released in 2 installments directly to beneficiary bank account after construction.
steps_en: Contact your local Gram Panchayat or Swachhta Doot
Submit application for free toilet construction
Gram Panchayat verifies eligibility
Rs 12,000 released in 2 instalments to your bank account
Construct toilet using the amount
Gram Panchayat verifies construction for second instalment

schemes.name: Driving License
schemes.eligibility: Indian citizen aged 18+ for cars/bikes (16+ for gearless two-wheelers up to 50cc). Must pass a driving test. Must hold a Learning License (LL) for at least 30 days before applying for permanent DL.
schemes.benefit: Official license to legally drive motor vehicles on Indian roads. Valid for 20 years or till age 50 (whichever is earlier). Smart card format with QR code.
documents: Address proof (electricity bill / passport / ration card)
steps_en: Visit parivahan.gov.in/sarathi
Register and apply for Learning License (LL) first
Pass LL test at RTO (theory test on traffic rules)
After 30 days, apply for permanent Driving License
Book slot for driving test at RTO
Pass driving test on designated track
DL smart card delivered to your address within 7 days

schemes.name: Birth Certificate
schemes.eligibility: Any child born in India. Registration mandatory within 21 days of birth (free). After 21 days – late registration with fee. After 1 year – requires magistrate order. Parents or authorized person can apply.
schemes.benefit: Official government document proving date and place of birth. Required for school admission, passport, Aadhaar, and all government services. Free if registered within 21 days.
documents: Proof of address (electricity bill / ration card)
steps_en: Hospital reports birth to local municipal body within 21 days
If not done, visit your Municipal Corporation / Gram Panchayat
Fill Birth Registration Form
Submit hospital birth report and parent IDs
Certificate issued within 7 working days
Download digital copy from crsorgi.gov.in

schemes.name: Indian Passport
schemes.eligibility: Any Indian citizen. Minors need parent's consent. Normal processing: 30-45 days. Tatkal (urgent): 1-3 days with extra fee. No criminal record required (or police verification clears).
schemes.benefit: Official travel document for international travel. Valid for 10 years (adults) / 5 years or till 18 (minors). 36 or 60 pages booklet. Serves as strongest identity proof in India.
documents: Proof of address (electricity bill / bank statement / voter ID)
Birth certificate / 10th marksheet (for date of birth)
steps_en: Visit passportindia.gov.in and register account
Fill application form online (new/renewal/reissue)
Pay fee online: Rs 1,500 (normal) / Rs 3,500 (tatkal)
Book appointment at nearest Passport Seva Kendra (PSK)
Visit PSK with original documents on appointment date
Biometrics captured at PSK
Police verification at your address within 2 weeks
Passport delivered via Speed Post within 30 days

schemes.name: Income Certificate
schemes.eligibility: Any Indian citizen who needs to prove their annual family income for government scheme applications, fee concessions, reservations, or subsidies. Usually valid for 1-3 years depending on state.
schemes.benefit: Official certificate of annual income. Required for scholarships, subsidized housing, BPL schemes, school/college fee waivers, EWS reservation, and all means-tested government benefits.
steps_en: Visit your state's e-District portal or nearest Tahsildar office
Fill income certificate application form
Attach Aadhaar, ration card, and salary/income proof
Pay nominal processing fee (Rs 10-50)
Talathi/Patwari verifies income at your residence
Certificate issued within 7-15 working days
Download digitally signed copy from e-District portal

schemes.name: Stand Up India Scheme
schemes.eligibility: SC/ST and/or women entrepreneurs aged 18+ years. For setting up a new enterprise in manufacturing, services, or trading sector. Loan between Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore. One SC/ST and one woman entrepreneur per bank branch.
schemes.benefit: Bank loan from Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore for greenfield enterprises. Composite loan covering 75% of project cost. Repayment tenure up to 7 years with 18-month moratorium.
steps_en: Visit standupmitra.in portal
Register as new entrepreneur
Fill application with business details and project report
System connects you to nearest bank branch
Bank evaluates your proposal
Loan sanctioned within 2-3 weeks
75% project cost funded, 25% from entrepreneur/subsidy

schemes.name: Ladli Behna Yojana (MP/MH)
schemes.eligibility: Married women aged 21-60 years. Family annual income below Rs 2.5 lakh. Not a government employee or income tax payer. Must be a resident of the state (Madhya Pradesh / Maharashtra variants).
schemes.benefit: Monthly financial assistance of Rs 1,250 (increasing to Rs 3,000) directly to woman's bank account. No conditions on spending — for nutrition, health, and economic empowerment.
steps_en: Visit nearest Gram Panchayat or registration camp
Fill Ladli Behna form with Aadhaar and bank details
Submit documents and get receipt
Application verified by local authority
Approved applicants receive Rs 1,250/month in bank account
Check status on cmladlibahna.mp.gov.in or via SMS

schemes.name: PM SVANidhi (Street Vendors)
schemes.eligibility: Street vendors who were vending on or before 24 March 2020. Must have a Certificate of Vending or Letter of Recommendation from ULB (Urban Local Body). All states and UTs covered.
schemes.benefit: Working capital loan: Rs 10,000 (1st loan), Rs 20,000 (2nd), Rs 50,000 (3rd). 7% interest subsidy on timely repayment. Rs 1,200/year cashback for digital transactions.
documents: Certificate of Vending / LoR from Municipality
steps_en: Visit pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in
Register with Aadhaar and mobile number
Upload Certificate of Vending or LoR
Apply for Rs 10,000 working capital loan
Loan sanctioned by bank within 30 days
Repay on time to get 7% interest subsidy
After repayment, eligible for Rs 20,000 second loan

schemes.name: PMGDISHA – Free Computer Training
schemes.eligibility: Indian citizens aged 14-60 years who are digitally illiterate. Priority to non-smartphone users, SC/ST, minorities, BPL, women, and differently-abled. One person per household eligible.
schemes.benefit: Free 20-hour digital literacy training covering operating smartphone/tablet, internet, email, digital payments (UPI/BHIM), accessing government services online. Certificate on completion.
steps_en: Visit nearest CSC (Common Service Centre) or PMGDISHA training centre
Register with Aadhaar and basic details
Attend 20-hour digital literacy training
Learn to use smartphone, internet, email, UPI payments
Pass online assessment test
Receive PMGDISHA digital literacy certificate

schemes.name: IGNWPS – Widow Pension Scheme
schemes.eligibility: Widows aged 40-79 years from BPL households. Must not be remarried. Not receiving any other pension. State-specific additional criteria may apply. Age 80+ get enhanced pension under IGNOAPS.
schemes.benefit: Monthly pension of Rs 300 (central) + state contribution (total Rs 600-2000 depending on state). Directly credited to bank account. No renewal needed — continues until remarriage or death.
documents: BPL ration card or income certificate
steps_en: Visit local Gram Panchayat or Municipal Ward Office
Ask for Widow Pension (IGNWPS) application form
Fill form with husband's death certificate and age proof
Submit BPL proof and bank details
Gram Panchayat forwards to Block/District office
Social Welfare Officer verifies and approves
Monthly pension starts within 30-60 days

schemes.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
schemes.eligibility: All farmers in India — landowners and tenant farmers. No income limit. Card issued free of cost every 2 years. Soil tested by government labs at no charge to farmer.
schemes.benefit: Free soil testing and health report card showing 12 soil parameters (N, P, K, pH, etc.). Recommends exact fertilizers and quantities needed — saves 15-20% on fertilizer costs. Improves crop yield.
steps_en: Contact your Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK) or agriculture office
Request soil sample collection from your farm
Government team collects soil sample free of cost
Sample tested in government soil testing lab
Soil Health Card generated within 2-3 weeks
View and download card on soilhealth.dac.gov.in
Follow fertilizer recommendations on the card for better yield
